description: it is a successful journey with all DLI team members who supported in developing this software. the customization requirements was accommodated to match our local and regional requirements and our internal policies and guidelines all across the region
author: Alia B.
pros: easy accessibility ,smart solution, strong technical support team
cons: the interface needs a little bit of modification
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Very good. They met our expectations and keep helping us to develop the system.
author: Nuryagdy R.
pros: Quick assistance from software developer on any issues
cons: Nothing serious to highlight. We received timely solution on any challenges we had.

description: Fair, good enough to have other done doing manual.
author: Edwin M.
pros: The functionality was simple and easy to understand. It was friendly user nothing much so complicated. Can easily adjust as per the required request adjustment from the end user.
cons: Monthly experiencing error and can't rely much on the accuracy of the output of transaction.

review_title: User Friendly, Economical and convenient HRIS
author: Jennifer B.
pros: Its ease of understanding and use, excellent support service for any troubleshooting and very helpful staff of DLI-IT Company
cons: There is nothing that I did not like about the Software...

description: It was good, but could have been better, if long workshops had been arranged with support team, to fix our problems right away, instead of waiting till next day; this interupts work.
author: Manal E.
cons: I would like to be able to change data entry mistakes.I would want more availability from support team during the launch period, which is happening now.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: An accurate and reliable HR system
author: Leeni W.
pros: When we have taken up this product, it was already developed to be full-fledged product to cater to most of education sector needs. Over these years, its found that HR works is quite a reliable product for payroll and leave management. The data is provided through this product is almost always accurate.
cons: 1. This product is available only on desktop version, however they are working on the web version. 2. While using this product, backend support is essential and their response is within the day. 3. Updates and developments in the product, is not in line with similar products in the market.

description: I am a common user of Attendance and Payroll and by having this software, it makes payroll calculation easy.
author: Marlene J.
pros: The Payroll and Attendance process has made the impact. It's integration to our existing business made the Payroll and Attendance processing easy.
cons: Maybe the leave application way of uploading to excel can be improved to make it convenient to use. The Pay Register is difficult to understand, this can be improved also to make it easy for the user to read and understand the information. It was not difficult to integrate the software to our existing business.

author: Simi E.
pros: User friendly. Reporting formats and details
cons: while any amendments required comparing with the old data and inputting parallelly is missing

author: Sanal P.
pros: This software is very easy to customize to your organization's individual needs. Also, it's extremely user-friendly and easy to set up, as well as fast and simple to run reports.
cons: So far, it's going well, our human resource team is pleased with the features of the software

description: I like the system, it is great. Easy to use.
author: Abigail R.
pros: It is simple and easy to use. I like that almost always there is a work around.
cons: The way we download the files from system and upload from system is tedious. There are still room for improving as requested by Finance Team.

description: The best thing about this software and company is the customer service support.
author: Anu V.
pros: Easy to use, Customer support and the process for doing payroll.
cons: Overall the software helps me in the daily reporting.

author: Ajay V.
pros: User Friendly , All the report available.
cons: Support Team, immediate action for support

description: You can easily use and adopt it
author: Subba Rao R.
pros: A minimal amount of customization is needed to use the software
cons: Unless you customize, all features and reports are not available

author: Riju M.
pros: We had used many applications , HRWORKS have good features and good support.
cons: Expecting a better mobile app, May be they are planning same.

description: the HRworks has made some improvement however still needs more improvement
author: Nesrine B.
pros: The Payroll is just easy to process so far.
cons: Need to reduce complexity, make things easier for the user, and improve the features that meet our needs.

author: Yasmine S.
pros: Easy to use, saving time, and accurate, giving reports and statistics, multi-functional system.
cons: add more features to cover all the employees information in just one report.

description: Very happy we moved from PMS software to HR Works and would recommend it to others. The team and the support is competent and friendly.
author: Maya A.
pros: - Easy to use - User friendly - Reports - Multiple reports and fields selection according to my needs.
cons: - I have to do manual calculation of joining and separation salary as the system does not calculate properly. Need enhancement in this area.

author: Ahmad A.
cons: Nothings all are fine good systems ever

author: Tahir R.
pros: Simple software with multi reports generation.
cons: Software is very simple and user friendly. Less data entry and generate more reports.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
